interaction_phrase: jointly inaugurated in a triplex event at FZJ, CEA
occurrence_sentence: On November 13th, the quantum processors Jade and Ruby are being jointly inaugurated in a triplex event at FZJ, CEA and the European Commission's premises, reflecting the collaborative nature of the project.

interaction_phrase: By leveraging the benefits of the architecture
occurrence_sentence: By leveraging the benefits of the architecture in combination with different hardware platforms, ParityQC is working actively together with the quantum ecosystem to continue the path of exponential growth.

interaction_phrase: shaping the foundation of the ParityQC Architecture
occurrence_sentence: As a Quantum Algorithm Developer, you'll design and implement pioneering fault-tolerant quantum algorithms co-developed with our Quantum Error Correction team, shaping the foundation of the ParityQC Architecture.

interaction_phrase: Cross-site collaboration between Hamburg and Innsbruck
occurrence_sentence: Cross-site collaboration between Hamburg and Innsbruck within a highly specialized scientific ecosystem.

interaction_phrase: Cross-site collaboration between Hamburg and Innsbruck
occurrence_sentence: Cross-site collaboration between Hamburg and Innsbruck within a highly specialized scientific ecosystem.

interaction_phrase: the ParityQC Architecture
occurrence_sentence: As a Quantum Algorithm Developer, you'll design and implement pioneering fault-tolerant quantum algorithms co-developed with our Quantum Error Correction team, shaping the foundation of the ParityQC Architecture.

interaction_phrase: using the ParityQC Architecture
occurrence_sentence: You will develop pioneering realizations of multi-qubit gates including noise effects and support the co-designing of algorithms and error correction protocols specifically adapted to these hardware platforms, using the ParityQC Architecture.

interaction_phrase: using the ParityQC Architecture
occurrence_sentence: You will develop pioneering realizations of multi-qubit gates including noise effects and support the co-designing of algorithms and error correction protocols specifically adapted to these hardware platforms, using the ParityQC Architecture.

interaction_phrase: realizing the ParityQC Architecture
occurrence_sentence: In this role, you will be instrumental in realizing the ParityQC Architecture using superconducting qubits, working closely with our hardware partners.

interaction_phrase: part of the larger initiative QCMobility by the DLR Quantum Computing Initiative
occurrence_sentence: The newly launched project is part of the larger initiative QCMobility by the DLR Quantum Computing Initiative (DLR QCI)

interaction_phrase: part of the larger initiative QCMobility by the DLR Quantum Computing Initiative
occurrence_sentence: The project kicked off with a joint event at the DLR Quantum Innovation Center in Ulm on Tuesday, November 18th. The newly launched project is part of the larger initiative QCMobility by the DLR Quantum Computing Initiative (DLR QCI), led by the DLR Institute of Quantum Technologies (DLR QT) in cooperation with various DLR institutes and several industrial contractors.

interaction_phrase: led by the DLR Institute of Quantum Technologies
occurrence_sentence: The newly launched project is part of the larger initiative QCMobility by the DLR Quantum Computing Initiative (DLR QCI), led by the DLR Institute of Quantum Technologies (DLR QT) in cooperation with various DLR institutes and several industrial contractors.

interaction_phrase: in cooperation with various DLR institutes
occurrence_sentence: The newly launched project is part of the larger initiative QCMobility by the DLR Quantum Computing Initiative (DLR QCI), led by the DLR Institute of Quantum Technologies (DLR QT) in cooperation with various DLR institutes and several industrial contractors.

interaction_phrase: DLR Quantum Computing Initiative
occurrence_sentence: The DLR Quantum Computing Initiative (DLR QCI) brings together research, industry and start-ups to jointly develop quantum computers, manufacturing technologies, the software stack, and relevant use cases.

interaction_phrase: the ParityQC Architecture
occurrence_sentence: This alignment means that hardware built around the ParityQC Architecture can support universal measurement-based quantum computation with a highly restricted and experimentally convenient measurement set, thus reducing the demands on the physical layer while retaining full computational power.

interaction_phrase: built around the ParityQC Architecture
occurrence_sentence: This alignment means that hardware built around the ParityQC Architecture can support universal measurement-based quantum computation with a highly restricted and experimentally convenient measurement set, thus reducing the demands on the physical layer while retaining full computational power.

interaction_phrase: together with their partners from the QSolid consortium
occurrence_sentence: Scientists at Forschungszentrum Jülich, together with their partners from the QSolid consortium, have achieved a significant project milestone: the project team has successfully integrated the prototype of a quantum computer into the Jülich Supercomputing Centre's infrastructure, known as JUNIQ.

interaction_phrase: integrated the prototype of a quantum computer into the Jülich Supercomputing Centre's
occurrence_sentence: Scientists at Forschungszentrum Jülich, together with their partners from the QSolid consortium, have achieved a significant project milestone: the project team has successfully integrated the prototype of a quantum computer into the Jülich Supercomputing Centre's infrastructure, known as JUNIQ.

interaction_phrase: together with their partners from the QSolid consortium
occurrence_sentence: Scientists at Forschungszentrum Jülich, together with their partners from the QSolid consortium, have achieved a significant project milestone: the project team has successfully integrated the prototype of a quantum computer into the Jülich Supercomputing Centre's infrastructure, known as JUNIQ.

interaction_phrase: into the Jülich Supercomputing Centre's infrastructure
occurrence_sentence: Scientists at Forschungszentrum Jülich, together with their partners from the QSolid consortium, have achieved a significant project milestone: the project team has successfully integrated the prototype of a quantum computer into the Jülich Supercomputing Centre's infrastructure, known as JUNIQ.

interaction_phrase: coordinator of QSolid
occurrence_sentence: "It is an outstanding achievement by our team to have succeeded in building a complete prototype from scratch. From the chip upwards, it consists of hardware developed at Forschungszentrum Jülich. In addition, another prototype will be launched in January. The feedback from our first users will now be crucial to further optimise the quantum computer," explains Prof. Dr. Frank Wilhelm-Mauch, coordinator of QSolid.

interaction_phrase: supplied the necessary software components, while Forschungszentrum Jülich carried out the professional
occurrence_sentence: The development and integration of the software stack, a collection of functional software components, was achieved through close collaboration between research institutions and industrial partners. The companies Qruise and Eviden, key providers in the fields of quantum firmware and high-performance computing, supplied the necessary software components, while Forschungszentrum Jülich carried out the professional system integration.

interaction_phrase: supplied the necessary software components, while Forschungszentrum Jülich carried out the professional
occurrence_sentence: The development and integration of the software stack, a collection of functional software components, was achieved through close collaboration between research institutions and industrial partners. interaction_phrase: strategic partnership
occurrence_sentence: QUDORA, a leading german full-stack quantum computing developer, and ParityQC, the quantum architecture company, announce a strategic partnership to optimize quantum algorithm performance on trapped-ion hardware platforms.

interaction_phrase: engaged with partners such as the German Aerospace Center (DLR)
occurrence_sentence: QUDORA operates from Germany, while ParityQC is based in Austria with subsidiaries in Germany, France and UK. Both companies are engaged with partners such as the German Aerospace Center (DLR) and NXP Semiconductors, creating a strong foundation for coordinated technical development.
